name: my-claude-plugin-marketplace
description: Personal marketplace for Keril Patel's Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: doc-structurer
plugins.description: Restructures and polishes a master LaTeX document for a target context — structure, phrasing, emphasis — compiles it with tectonic, logs the run, and optionally pushes to GitHub for record keeping. Never invents content.

plugins.name: prose-polisher
plugins.description: Writes a fresh cover letter for a job description, drawing every fact from the master resume and the layout from the master letter, compiles it to PDF with tectonic, and optionally pushes to GitHub for record keeping. Never invents content.
